---
title: "first_plots"
author: "Marcelo Perez Guzman"
date: "2026-06-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## CHS Project, Table plotting

This is the initial table plots of the CHS project. 

#### Setup 
```{r start, message=FALSE}
# install tableone
library(tableone, crosstable)

# get the dataset
getwd()
chs <- my_data <- read.csv("CHS_cohortE(in).csv")
str(chs)
```

## Table 1

This is what shows up after creating a table with the tableone package, without any modifications

```{r first table, echo=FALSE}
CreateTableOne(data = chs)
```

```{r second table}
#c1 = crosstable(chs, c(educ), by = 'hisp', total="both", percent_pattern="{n} ({p_row})", percent_digits=1)
#as_flextable(c1)
```
